regsensitivity: regression sensitivity analysis

Source: R/zzz.R
regsensitivity-package.Rd

Implements the identified-set and breakdown-point sensitivity analyses of Diegert, Masten and Poirier (2026), Oster (2019), and Masten and Poirier (2026) for the coefficient of interest in a linear regression with omitted variables.

Core functions

  • regsen_bounds() – identified set across sensitivity parameters

  • regsen_breakdown() – smallest sensitivity value at which a hypothesis fails

  • regsen_summary() – default summary sweep (DMP + Oster)

  • plot.regsensitivity() – ggplot2 visualization

Reference data

  • bfg2020 – subset of the Bazzi, Fiszbein & Gebresilasse (2020) replication data, used to demonstrate the package.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/mikenguyen13/regsensitivity

  • https://mikenguyen13.github.io/regsensitivity/

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/mikenguyen13/regsensitivity/issues
